description: Letter written in a mixture of Hebrew and Arabic script. Various blessings and Bible citations are rendered in Hebrew script, whereas the main part is written in Arabic script. Seems to be an elaborate letter of appeal for charity. Mentions Ibn ʿAwkal, Ibn al-Madhāmīrī, and Ibn Qurayẓa (v3–4). Also quotes ʿAlī b. Abī Ṭālib. (Information in part from CUDL.) Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
